sourcesContent:
export const I18N = {
  fr: {
    appName: "PanelCut Pro",
    newProject: "Nouveau Projet",
    configuration: "Configuration",
    panel: "Panneau",
    pieces: "Pièces",
    results: "Résultats",
    piecesToCut: "Pièces à découper",
    optimizedLayout: "Plan de découpe",
    projectName: "Nom du projet",
    client: "Client",
    company: "Entreprise",
    devisNum: "N° Devis",
    kerf: "Épaisseur de lame",
    tolerance: "Tolérance",
    addPiece: "Ajouter une pièce",
    optimize: "Optimiser",
    optimizing: "Calcul en cours...",
    save: "Enregistrer",
    cancel: "Annuler",
    delete: "Supprimer",
    scan: "Scanner",
    no_pieces: "Aucune pièce.",
    pieces_count: "pièces",
    totalPanels: "Panneaux",
    utilization: "Utilisation",
    waste: "Chutes",
    totalCost: "Coût",
    required: "Requis",
    invalidLength: "Longueur invalide",
    invalidHeight: "Hauteur invalide",
    invalidQty: "Quantité invalide"
  },
  en: {
    appName: "PanelCut Pro",
    newProject: "New Project",
    configuration: "Configuration",
    panel: "Panel",
    pieces: "Pieces",
    results: "Results",
    piecesToCut: "Pieces to cut",
    optimizedLayout: "Optimized Layout",
    projectName: "Project Name",
    client: "Client",
    company: "Company",
    devisNum: "Quote #",
    kerf: "Blade Thickness",
    tolerance: "Tolerance",
    addPiece: "Add Piece",
    optimize: "Optimize",
    optimizing: "Calculating...",
    save: "Save",
    cancel: "Cancel",
    delete: "Delete",
    scan: "Scan",
    no_pieces: "No pieces yet.",
    pieces_count: "pieces",
    totalPanels: "Total Panels",
    utilization: "Usage",
    waste: "Waste",
    totalCost: "Est. Cost",
    required: "Required",
    invalidLength: "Invalid length",
    invalidHeight: "Invalid height",
    invalidQty: "Invalid quantity"
  }
};

export const useLang = () => 'fr';
